purpose: Trusted internal reference for the 31 official core tables in fah_sai_lpk_core.

important_boundary.usage_rule: Use this core reference only for internal schema inspection, SQL validation, citation audit, or trusted DB tooling. Do not inject all 31 core tables into the normal production RAG prompt.

type_rules: ID-like fields are text unless a table-specific numeric surrogate exists.
Polymorphic columns such as source_table, source_pk, related_entity_table, and related_entity_id are citation/routing fields, not normal foreign keys.

dimension_tables.dim_bank_account: Bank account master, account role, currency, branch association.
dimension_tables.dim_branch: Branch/HQ/service-center master and branch traffic/headcount allocation hints.
dimension_tables.dim_care_plus_sku_tier: Care-plus coverage and price by SKU and policy version.
dimension_tables.dim_customer: Customer master, B2B/B2C attributes, loyalty, account manager, contact fields.
dimension_tables.dim_date: Date dimension with Buddhist Era calendar, fiscal year/quarter, holiday flags.
dimension_tables.dim_employee: Employee master with department, branch, position level, and role.
dimension_tables.dim_policy_version: Policy document/version master and effective-period policy metadata.
dimension_tables.dim_product: SKU/product master, category, vendor, department, price/cost attributes.
dimension_tables.dim_promo_mechanic: Promotion mechanics/rules under campaigns and policy versions.
dimension_tables.dim_signing_authority_ladder: Approval authority thresholds by policy, department, role, and amount.
dimension_tables.dim_vendor: Vendor master and account manager context.
dimension_tables.dim_vendor_contract_version: Vendor contract terms and effective-period contract metadata.

fact_bank_transaction.use_for: Bank movement, reconciliation, refund/vendor/payroll/deposit payment traces.

fact_cs_interaction.use_for: Customer contact, complaint themes, follow-up and service context.

fact_inventory_monthly_snapshot.use_for: Stock-on-hand, slow-moving, reorder and inventory-risk questions.

fact_inventory_movement.use_for: Transfers, adjustments, receipts, and stock movements.

fact_loyalty_ledger.grain: one row per loyalty points ledger entry
fact_loyalty_ledger.use_for: Points earn, burn, expiry, and adjustment questions.

fact_payroll.use_for: Payroll payments, employee compensation, and bank payout traces.

fact_promo_redemption.use_for: Campaign usage and customer/order promo linkage.

fact_refund_paid.use_for: Refund amounts, approval, method, and bank transaction linkage.

fact_return.use_for: Return reasons, refund linkage, and post-sale issue analysis.

fact_sales.use_for: Order counts, branch/channel/customer/payment status, order-level totals.

fact_sales_line_item.grain: one row per sales line item

fact_shipping.use_for: Delivery status, carrier, SLA, and delivery issues.

fact_vendor_payment.grain: one row per vendor payment/invoice event
fact_vendor_payment.use_for: AP, vendor payment status, contract, bank transaction, and posting lag.

fact_warranty_claim.use_for: Warranty issue types, service status, SKU/customer/branch context.

document_inventory_table.t2_doc_inventory: Official document inventory and document metadata for mapping policies, reports, memos, and OCR/document references back to official files.

default_date_rule: For fact tables, use business_event_date as the default period filter when the question mentions a month, quarter, or year without specifying a date axis.
Use posting_date only when the question explicitly asks for accounting, posted, booked, or bank-posting timing.
Treat effective_date and as_of_date as metadata/snapshot dates unless a table-specific policy requires them.
Convert Buddhist Era years before filtering. BE 2568 means 2025-01-01 inclusive through 2026-01-01 exclusive.
safe_join_guide: Inventory events/snapshots join branch_code to dim_branch and sku_id to dim_product.
Policy/version joins use policy_version_id against dim_policy_version.
aggregation_rules: fact_sales is order-grain. Sum order-level totals here.
fact_sales_line_item is line-grain. Sum line_total_thb or line-level fields here.
Do not sum repeated order-level values after joining fact_sales to fact_sales_line_item unless the query groups back to txn_id first.
For product/category/vendor revenue, use fact_sales_line_item line amounts.
For order/channel/branch/customer revenue, prefer fact_sales order-level totals.
For inventory risk, distinguish movement events from monthly snapshots.
citation_rules: Core tables are official source-of-truth tables for citation and validation.
Prefer source_table/source_pk from model-facing views or retrieved evidence, then map back to the matching core table and primary key.
Cite official core rows/tables, official document paths, or document evidence.
Do not cite helper marts, internal audit tables, or prompt artifacts as business evidence.
Use t2_doc_inventory and document_evidence for policy/report/OCR citations.

remote_artifact_query.text: SELECT content FROM fah_sai_lpk_meta.mschema_artifacts WHERE artifact_name = 'fahmai_core_description' AND schema_mode = 'core_reference' AND artifact_format = 'text';
remote_artifact_query.json: SELECT content FROM fah_sai_lpk_meta.mschema_artifacts WHERE artifact_name = 'fahmai_core_description' AND schema_mode = 'core_reference' AND artifact_format = 'json';
